raw_consumer_statement:
I got a call from XXXX Police, a person impersonating a Police officer extorted money from me. He told me my immigration was under check and I was a criminal. Failing to comply will result in prison for at least 5 years. I let Amex know about this situation ASAP and the unauthorized charges but they refused to refund me. 

I have filed a report with the Police and have the incident numbers below : Incident Number : XXXX, Reported on XXXX XXXX Incident Number : XXXX, Reported on XXXX XXXX Below are the transactions : XX/XX/XXXX : XXXX - XXXX Transactions {$440.00} {$470.00} {$800.00} {$860.00} {$990.00} {$450.00} {$480.00} {$480.00} {$480.00}
